creator: dmlb@ragnet.demon.co.uk
text:
A small change to the Makefile and patches so that configuring 
	tkdesk is better handled. This is a side effect of working on a
	pre-release of TkDesk-1.2 which will be able to use Tcl 8.0.

Fix: Diffs against ports CVSupd on 19/12/98
How-To-Repeat: 
	Not applicable
